summary: The implementation successfully addresses all four requirements. Comments are stored in the backend with timestamps, and a CommentSection component allows users to view and submit comments on blog posts. Image upload capability has been added to both create and edit pages using ExternalBlob with upload progress tracking. The backend now stores images as ExternalBlob types and includes methods to add/retrieve comments. All acceptance criteria appear to be met based on the diff evidence.

hallucinated_features.description: Migration module for data model upgrade
hallucinated_features.reason: The diff includes backend/migration.mo with logic to migrate old BlogPost structures to new ones with image and comments fields. This migration capability was not requested in the BuildRequest.
